summary: Created autonomous seeded camera motion system using layered sine harmonics. cameraMotion.ts generates per-seed harmonic curves (3 per position axis, 2 per lookAt axis) with incommensurate periods (30-120s) to produce smooth, non-repeating camera drift around base position (0,0,5). Bass energy modulates orbit radius (macro parallax), motionAmplitude scales all displacement (supports prefers-reduced-motion). Pointer has no effect on camera. Integrated into renderLoop.ts: initCameraMotion called on first frame with session seed, updateCamera called each frame after evolveParams and before render. All 17 tests pass, build succeeds.
